rows.finalText: One workable lens for "What is the next right step in my calling" is Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Book (26), so not everything is visible yet is already in play. Here, Book emphasizes private knowledge, research, what is not yet visible, and the need to learn before you declare certainty. In Present, Bouquet (9) becomes the pivot, so grace and appreciation open relational doors turns into both pressure and opportunity. Here, Bouquet emphasizes the gift, charm, and invitation layer of the situation, especially where recognition and goodwill increase momentum. Book (26) with Scythe (10) keep emphasizing a blend of knowledge and cut, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to reactive or harsh decisions.
